title: 🔥周期坐标重演22年深熊
body: 市场处于深度熊市筑底期。AHR999(3D)报0.45，精准对应2022年6月均值0.44的历史极值。尽管指标7日反弹13.1%，但当前所处的时间节点与上轮周期底部高度重合。数据证实市场已完成深度出清，周期反转只需耐心等待。谁能熬过最后的至暗时刻？
title_en: 🔥Cyclical Coordinates Reenact the '22 Deep Bear Market
body_en: The market is in the deep bear market bottoming phase. AHR999 (3D) sits at 0.45, precisely matching the historical extreme of 0.44 from June 2022. Despite a 13.1% 7-day rebound, the current timeline heavily overlaps with the previous cycle's bottom. Data confirms the market flush is complete; the cycle reversal just requires patience. Who can survive the final darkest hour?
